description: tale-mode (Layer 1) — always-on discipline + autonomous goal loop + deterministic phase auto-arm. A SessionStart hook injects tale-mode's core disciplines (verify-against-source / foundation-first / two-strike) into every session as additive static text (overrides nothing). A UserPromptExpansion hook marks a deliberate build phase when you run /tale-mode:kickoff-phase. A deterministic Stop gate (bash) keeps the turn going until the armed checks pass: an agent-written .claude/active-goal.json AND/OR — during a marked phase, with uncommitted changes and a content-hash-TRUSTED .claude/tale-mode.json — that committed config's gates. Silent (and free) when nothing is armed, bounded by max_rounds + a fail-open. The optional Layer-2 Sonnet governor ships as a separate companion plugin: tale-mode-governor.
